summary: SEC-5.0 OTS-canary anchor `;return false` removed (PATCH-302-A). Fix matches the now-canonical pattern in WIN-058/058b/062 (no `;return false`). The (b) sub-task — adding stable subsection id `ots-2026-04-17-concession` — deferred to a follow-up EXP because it requires coordinated edits to both the source anchor and the Timestamp Error tab.
